description: Exports a Fabric Ontology item to standard OWL RDF/XML format. Compatible with Ontology Playground, Protege, and standard RDF tools. Use --format jsonld for JSON-LD output.
notes: Without --file, outputs raw RDF/XML to stdout. The exported file can be re-imported with `fabio ontology import --file ontology.rdf`. Supports full round-trip: Fabric → RDF → Fabric preserves all entity types, properties, and relationships.

query_examples.description: Total property count across all entity types.
